title: Provenance-Anchored Reputation (PAR): A2A extension manifest
description: Declares the AgentCard payload a PAR-aware agent advertises under capabilities.extensions[]. PAR standardizes the evidence layer (Verified Interaction Records anchored to AP2 mandates); scoring is delegated to consuming engines.

operator_id.description: Durable operator identity (DID or https URL) this AgentCard's reputation attaches to.

vir_endpoint.description: Endpoint serving this operator's set of Verified Interaction Records.

derived.description: Optional pointer to scores produced by a DELEGATED engine (not standardized by PAR).
